rationale: The cited paper appears thematically relevant as prior marketing text-analytics work showing incremental predictive value of linguistic features and using methods (e.g., LIWC/ML) that overlap with the citing paper’s stated benchmarking and predictive-validity focus. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but substantive use is not yet clear.
